reviews.comment:
Muy rapida la atención, super amables los chicos de la playa! Pero lo único en contra es el mal estado de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very fast, and the beach staff were super friendly! The only downside was the poor condition of the restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Baños en condiciones deplorables, sin limpieza ni mantenimiento.. el personal atiende bien pero se ve que el encargado no usa esos baños porque sino por lo menos le tiraria unos baldazos de agua a las paredes.....

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are in deplorable condition, lacking cleanliness and maintenance. The staff is friendly, but it's clear the manager doesn't use them, otherwise he'd at least throw buckets of water on the walls.
